MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT AMELIA ASSOCIATES' Motion For Leave To File Cross- Complaint is GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PHA

Off Calendar May-06-2008 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: ATTY. ERIC M. SAFIRE, TEL. 292-1940, FOR PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ANDREW M. GSCHWIND, OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, TEL.554-3973, FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. RULING: A R G U E D. AFTER HEARING THE ARGUMENT PRESENTED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/AL)
